subcodes.first_line: O thou suppliant and humble handmaiden of the Most Glorious Beauty! A hundred thousand gems among women, noblest among the tribes, most distinguished among virtuous souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه مبتهله خاشعه جمال ابهی صد هزار جواهر نساء و کرائم قبائل و شرائف عقائل
